name: Trendline Adult Dog Food - Lamb and Rice 15kg
description: Trendline Adult Dog Food -Lamb & Rice , fully balanced all-natural dog food with lamb protein, brewer's yeast for immune support and Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed. Carefully formulated by a dog nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein...................................20% Fat ......................................... 9% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)...........4% Crude Ash .............................8% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. Why Choose Trendline Lamb & Rice? 20% Lamb Protein – supports lean muscle and promotes sustained energy. 9% Healthy Fats – nourishes the skin and gives coats a glossy, soft finish. Brewer’s Yeast – strengthens immunity and supports gut health. Omega-3 & -6 Fatty Acids – maintain joint health and reduce shedding. Rice for Easy Digestion – gentle on sensitive stomachs, making it ideal for all adult dogs.
